_meta.description: Act 1 boss fights with full move patterns and strategy from wiki
_meta.usage: Load when: planning boss fight in Act 1, asking about Act 1 bosses

bosses.name: Slime Boss
mechanics: Splits at 50% HP into 2 Large Slimes
Pattern: Goop Spray → Preparing → Slam (35-38 dmg) → repeat
strategy_tips: Deal 70+ damage in first 3 turns to force early split
Bring the boss below 50% HP as much as possible before split to weaken resulting slimes

bosses.name: The Guardian
mechanics: Alternates between offensive and defensive modes
Defensive mode: High block, gains artifact
strategy_tips: Save burst damage for offensive mode
Don't waste debuffs during defensive mode (artifact blocks them)
Need frontload damage or multi-hit for artifact

bosses.name: Hexaghost
strategy_tips: Count turns - need big block on turn 7, 14, 21
Exhaust or discard Burns to manage hand
